title: Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018 (NZ)
description: New Zealand legislation governing funding, needs assessment, and means assessment for long-term residential care and home-based disability support services. Establishes rules for determining qualifying persons, contribution liability, and funder responsibility for care costs.

source.page_title: Residential Care and Disability Support Services Act 2018 | New Zealand Legislation

change_log.author: auto-generated
change_log.summary: Initial guardrail created from external legislation source. Establishes regulatory framework for residential care and disability support services funding and assessment in New Zealand.
